arts.ttl: Napoli vs. Como to kick off matchday 7
arts.sum: Como have scored 3+ goals in consecutive Serie A matches for just the second time in the top division, after last doing so in the 1951-52 season (v Udinese and Legnano in that case) – in general, the last newly promoted team in the top-flight to have scored at least three goals in three consecutive matches was Palermo between December 2014 and January 2015. Como are the team to have conceded the most goals from the 76th minute of play onwards in Serie A this term (5), while Napoli have scored four goals in the same time frame (a joint-high level with Parma) .

arts.ttl: Romelu Lukaku Credits Galatasaray Ace for Guiding His Move to Napoli
arts.sum: Former Inter and Roma striker Romelu Lukaku has returned to Serie A to reunite with his favorite head coach, Antonio Conte, at Napoli. The Belgium international has enjoyed a bright start to life at Stadio Diego Armando Maradona, tallying two goals and three assists in his first five appearances for the Partenopei. The post Romelu Lukaku Credits Galatasaray Ace for Guiding His Move to Napoli appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Napoli vs Como – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Serie A Matchday 7 commences on Friday at Stadio Diego Armando Maradona as Napoli and Como go head-to-head in their first-ever top-flight meeting. Both teams come into this round in high spirits after hitting a purple patch in the second half of September. The post Serie A Preview: Napoli vs Como – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Como: Match Preview
arts.sum: Napoli will look to maintain their position atop Serie A when they host newly-promoted Como at the Stadio Diego Armando Maradona on Friday evening. The Partenopei have enjoyed a strong start under new manager Antonio Conte, while Como are finding their feet after returning to the top flight for the first time in over two decades. Napoli currently lead Serie A with 13 points from six matches, one point clear of Juventus. They are unbeaten in their last five league games and have won all three of their home fixtures so far this season.
